item.title: I'm Just a Bill: National Diabetes Prevention Program Expansion
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Diabetes Prevention Program Expansion

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

National Diabetes Prevention Program (DPP) expansion in the 119th Congress addressing the documented Type 2 diabetes pre-diabetes pipeline.

What does it actually do?

  • Medicare DPP eligibility broadening
  • Provider-network expansion
  • Virtual-DPP coverage
  • Community-Health-Worker DPP delivery
  • Composing with Food Is Medicine framework

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #1 Lets Make Dinner, #6 Tatiana Schlossberg Health Accords, #7 MSA, and Food Is Medicine + Affordable Insulin Bounty Posters.
